samples.author: Sydney Marie Photography (Sydney Marie Photography)
samples.text: I recently photographed a wedding at Book Tower by Anthology Events. The space is STUNNING, and the staff were amazing to work with.

samples.author: Peyton Bias
samples.text: We got married at Book Tower on 12/29/24 and it was truly the perfect day. I knew when we toured the venue back while it was still under construction that it was going to be special, and I was thrilled to be totally correct! We had such a great experience with the Anthology Events team, Lauren was always super responsive and collaborative throughout the planning process and Maggie ensured everything was flawless on wedding day. The food is excellent, drinks were on point, the staff was friendly and attentive. They really went the extra mile to make sure we had a beautiful day, they even provided sweetheart tray of our cocktail hour bites for us to enjoy privately in the bridal suite and those first few moments alone together as husband and wife were so appreciated. I highly recommend Book Tower, you really couldn’t ask for a more beautiful, modern Detroit venue or a better staff.

samples.author: Zoe DeFazio
samples.text:
My husband and I got married 10/02/2025 and celebrated at The Book Tower. Anthology Events was incredible to work with and they made the whole wedding experience really enjoyable.

The night before our wedding they helped us welcome our guests with a Welcome Party at Bar Rotunda and it turned out perfect. The managers and additional staff were professional and friendly. They made sure only guests of the welcome party received food/drinks. The staff followed all the requests we had throughout the night. The food was great and Anthology was accommodating to make sure my vegetarian guests had different options.

Our wedding turned out to be one of the most perfect days. We can't say enough amazing things about the venue space itself. We hosted out cocktail hour at Kamper's and it was the best decision! While our guests enjoyed the rooftop the Anthology staff had set up a private room for us with food and champagne. The staff that worked the event were so amazing we had such a great time w

samples.author: Lisa Athens
samples.text: We hosted a wedding at the Book Tower and could not have been happier with the results. From the Terrace Room where the bridal party got ready, to the picturesque cocktail hour at Kamper's Rooftop overlooking the city , to the beautiful atrium reception and the after party - everything was wonderful and the service was amazing. Our guests raved about the food, the ambiance, and the bar was second to none! No one wanted to leave which made the after party a little larger than expected but that was a good thing. The planning was smooth from start to finish. Communication was excellent and they were very flexible with special requests we made. The space is perfect for up to 175 guests with a dance floor.

samples.author: Liesa Finazzo
samples.text: We recently hosted a corporate event at the Book Tower and were absolutely blown away. The venue itself is stunning, the food and cocktails were delicious, and the staff was incredibly accommodating. It was a perfect 10/10 experience. I wouldn't hesitate to book another event here in the future. A huge thank you to Nicole for her exceptional service!
